'''''Liberty Gambler''''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] that bore the [[Flagship/Legends|flag]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Longmar]] of the [[Pegasus Strike Force]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
